tokens.name: --zone-base-surface
tokens.value: color-mix(in oklch, var(--pig-base)    calc(3.5% * var(--zone-intensity)), var(--zone-ground-soft))

tokens.name: --zone-base-strong
tokens.value: color-mix(in oklch, var(--pig-base)    calc(7%   * var(--zone-intensity)), var(--zone-ground-soft))

tokens.name: --zone-base-edge
tokens.value: color-mix(in oklch, var(--pig-base)    calc(16%  * var(--zone-intensity)), var(--zone-ground))

tokens.name: --zone-content-surface
tokens.value: color-mix(in oklch, var(--pig-content) calc(3%  * var(--zone-intensity)), var(--zone-ground))

tokens.name: --zone-content-strong
tokens.value: color-mix(in oklch, var(--pig-content) calc(7%  * var(--zone-intensity)), var(--zone-ground))

tokens.name: --zone-content-edge
tokens.value: color-mix(in oklch, var(--pig-content) calc(15% * var(--zone-intensity)), var(--zone-ground))

tokens.name: --zone-panel-surface
tokens.value: color-mix(in oklch, var(--pig-panel) calc(5%  * var(--zone-intensity)), var(--zone-ground))

tokens.name: --zone-panel-strong
tokens.value: color-mix(in oklch, var(--pig-panel) calc(10% * var(--zone-intensity)), var(--zone-ground))

tokens.name: --zone-panel-edge
tokens.value: color-mix(in oklch, var(--pig-panel) calc(18% * var(--zone-intensity)), var(--zone-ground))

tokens.name: --zone-review-surface
tokens.value: color-mix(in oklch, var(--pig-review) calc(6%  * var(--zone-intensity)), var(--zone-ground))

tokens.name: --zone-review-strong
tokens.value: color-mix(in oklch, var(--pig-review) calc(12% * var(--zone-intensity)), var(--zone-ground))

tokens.name: --zone-review-edge
tokens.value: color-mix(in oklch, var(--pig-review) calc(22% * var(--zone-intensity)), var(--zone-ground))

tokens.name: --zone-source-surface
tokens.value: color-mix(in oklch, var(--pig-source) calc(5%  * var(--zone-intensity)), var(--zone-ground))

tokens.name: --zone-source-strong
tokens.value: color-mix(in oklch, var(--pig-source) calc(10% * var(--zone-intensity)), var(--zone-ground))

tokens.name: --zone-source-edge
tokens.value: color-mix(in oklch, var(--pig-source) calc(20% * var(--zone-intensity)), var(--zone-ground))

tokens.name: --zone-package-surface
tokens.value: color-mix(in oklch, var(--pig-package) calc(6.5% * var(--zone-intensity)), var(--zone-ground))

tokens.name: --zone-package-strong
tokens.value: color-mix(in oklch, var(--pig-package) calc(12%  * var(--zone-intensity)), var(--zone-ground))

tokens.name: --zone-package-edge
tokens.value: color-mix(in oklch, var(--pig-package) calc(22%  * var(--zone-intensity)), var(--zone-ground))

tokens.name: --zone-success-surface
tokens.value: color-mix(in oklch, var(--pig-success) calc(6%  * var(--zone-intensity)), var(--zone-ground))

tokens.name: --zone-success-strong
tokens.value: color-mix(in oklch, var(--pig-success) calc(12% * var(--zone-intensity)), var(--zone-ground))

tokens.name: --zone-success-edge
tokens.value: color-mix(in oklch, var(--pig-success) calc(22% * var(--zone-intensity)), var(--zone-ground))

tokens.name: --zone-warning-surface
tokens.value: color-mix(in oklch, var(--pig-warning) calc(7%  * var(--zone-intensity)), var(--zone-ground))

tokens.name: --zone-warning-strong
tokens.value: color-mix(in oklch, var(--pig-warning) calc(14% * var(--zone-intensity)), var(--zone-ground))

tokens.name: --zone-warning-edge
tokens.value: color-mix(in oklch, var(--pig-warning) calc(26% * var(--zone-intensity)), var(--zone-ground))

tokens.name: --zone-reject-surface
tokens.value: color-mix(in oklch, var(--pig-reject) calc(6%  * var(--zone-intensity)), var(--zone-ground))

tokens.name: --zone-reject-strong
tokens.value: color-mix(in oklch, var(--pig-reject) calc(12% * var(--zone-intensity)), var(--zone-ground))

tokens.name: --zone-reject-edge
tokens.value: color-mix(in oklch, var(--pig-reject) calc(24% * var(--zone-intensity)), var(--zone-ground))

tokens.name: --vi-surface
tokens.value: color-mix(in oklch, var(--accent-gold) calc(9%  * var(--gold-intensity)), var(--zone-ground))

tokens.name: --vi-strong
tokens.value: color-mix(in oklch, var(--accent-gold) calc(18% * var(--gold-intensity)), var(--zone-ground))

tokens.name: --vi-edge
tokens.value: color-mix(in oklch, var(--accent-gold) calc(46% * var(--gold-intensity)), var(--zone-ground))

tokens.name: --comm-surface
tokens.value: color-mix(in oklch, var(--accent-communication) calc(7%  * var(--zone-intensity)), var(--zone-ground))

tokens.name: --comm-strong
tokens.value: color-mix(in oklch, var(--accent-communication) calc(14% * var(--zone-intensity)), var(--zone-ground))

tokens.name: --comm-edge
tokens.value: color-mix(in oklch, var(--accent-communication) calc(40% * var(--gold-intensity)),  var(--zone-ground))

tokens.name: --elev-1
tokens.value:
0 1px 2px   color-mix(in srgb, var(--shadow-c) 8%,  transparent),
    0 1px 1px   color-mix(in srgb, var(--shadow-c) 6%,  transparent)

tokens.name: --elev-2
tokens.value:
0 2px 6px   color-mix(in srgb, var(--shadow-c) 10%, transparent),
    0 1px 2px   color-mix(in srgb, var(--shadow-c) 8%,  transparent)

tokens.name: --elev-3
tokens.value:
0 8px 20px -6px  color-mix(in srgb, var(--shadow-c) 16%, transparent),
    0 2px 6px  -2px  color-mix(in srgb, var(--shadow-c) 10%, transparent)

tokens.name: --elev-4
tokens.value:
0 18px 40px -12px color-mix(in srgb, var(--shadow-c) 22%, transparent),
    0 4px 10px -4px   color-mix(in srgb, var(--shadow-c) 12%, transparent)

tokens.name: --elev-5
tokens.value:
0 32px 64px -20px color-mix(in srgb, var(--shadow-c) 28%, transparent),
    0 8px 18px -8px   color-mix(in srgb, var(--shadow-c) 14%, transparent)
